# CREDITS.txt - Open Pixel Resource-Village asset attribution
# Generated by Wave 1.1 (W1.1) of the resource-village-loop plan.
# Format (one row per PNG, TAB-separated): path<TAB>source_url<TAB>author<TAB>license
# All assets are redistributable (CC-BY-SA 3.0, CC-BY 4.0, CC-BY-SA 3.0/GPL3, or CC0 1.0).
# Excluded: any asset whose license blocks commercial use or redistribution; see packet
# section 2 for the full rejection list (the brand names there are deliberately omitted here).
# Tile grids: base/farm = 32x32 cells (LPC), mine = 16x16 cells (0x72 dungeon).
# W2.1 registers each sheet as a Tiled tileset at the noted cell size; it must NOT mix
# 16x16 mine tiles on the same Tiled layer as 32x32 LPC tiles (see packet section 7).
#
# LPC Base attribution chain: LPC contributors (Stephen Challener, Redshrike,
#   Lanea Zimmerman/Sharm, Daniel Eddeland/Daneeklu, Richard Kettering/Jetrel,
#   Zachariah Husiar/Zabin, Hyptosis, and the Liberated Pixel Cup base collection).
# LPC Farm attribution chain: bluecarrot16, Wolthera van Hovell tot Westerflier
#   (TheraHedwig), Ivan Voirol. Based on Ivan Voirol 'Slates' and TheraHedwig
#   'LPC compatible Ancient Greek Architecture'.
# LPC Crops attribution chain: bluecarrot16, Daniel Eddeland (daneeklu),
#   Joshua Taylor, Richard Kettering (Jetrel). Commissioned by castelonia.
# LPC Fruit Trees attribution chain: bluecarrot16, Joshua Taylor, cynicmusic.
#   Commissioned by castelonia.
# 0x72 mine: CC0 1.0, attribution optional but recorded for courtesy. Canonical
#   source is the itch.io page; W1.1 retrieved it from a CC0 GitHub mirror at
#   https://github.com/marceloferreira357/bun-crawler-client because the itch.io
#   download requires a JS 'name your own price' flow (see packet section 2).
